name: notification-system-expert
description: Architectural opinions for notification system implementation in React PWA applications

notification_type_selection.title: Which Notification Types to Implement
notification_type_selection.description: Should app implement toast, push, in-app, or all three notification types?
notification_type_selection.rationale: Different notification types serve different purposes. Toast for immediate feedback, push for engagement when offline, in-app for persistent notifications. Implementation complexity vs user value must be balanced.

context.when_applicable: All React applications with user feedback requirements
context.when_not_applicable: Read-only applications with no user actions

options.name: Toast + In-App (Recommended for Internal Tools)
options.description: Implement toast for immediate feedback and in-app notification center for history
cons: No notifications when app is closed
options.use_when: Internal tools where users are actively using the app

options.name: Toast + Push + In-App (Recommended for Customer-Facing)
options.description: Full notification system with all three types
options.use_when: Customer-facing apps where offline engagement is critical

options.name: Toast Only
options.use_when: Simple apps with low notification frequency
